judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with strong earnings expansion but significant debt and negative free cash flow.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 34.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 122.7% YoY and earnings growth 326.0% YoY indicate massive expansion.
Quarterly earnings growth of 344.4% shows strong recent performance.
Forward P/E of 10.16x is attractive relative to current growth.
Strong analyst growth estimates for the current quarter (74.1%) and fiscal year (26.0%).
Return on equity at 17.9% and return on assets at 5.5% are solid.
negatives: High Debt/Equity ratio of 120.80 and total debt of $9.15B against $1.31B cash.
Free cash flow is negative at $-7.45B TTM, indicating cash burn.
Gross margin at 8.4% and operating margin at 6.1% are relatively thin.
Analyst consensus is 'hold' with a wide range in price targets, indicating uncertainty.

news.paragraph: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) is facing some regulatory headwinds in Taiwan as authorities seek to detain individuals in a crackdown related to Nvidia smuggling. Meanwhile, Mizuho maintained a neutral rating on the stock, suggesting a balanced view from analysts. The upcoming earnings report on August 4th will be a key event to watch for any impact from these developments.

headlines.title: Taiwan Seeks to Detain Three in Nvidia Smuggling Crackdown
Mizuho Maintains a Neutral Rating on Super Micro Computer, Inc. (SMCI)
